name: auth_create
description: Authenticate a private or presence channel subscription. Your server generates this auth response and returns it to the client.

parameters.name: socket_id
parameters.description: The socket ID of the connecting client.

parameters.name: channel_name
parameters.description: The channel being subscribed to (private- or presence- prefix).

parameters.name: channel_data
parameters.description: JSON string with user_id and user_info for presence channels.
